title: baccharis glutinosa var. angustissima
intro: Baccharis glutinosa var. angustissima, also known as narrow-leaved Ecuadorian tree baccharis, is a plant species in the aster family that is native to South America, particularly in Ecuador and Peru. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Baccharis glutinosa var. angustissima include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
